vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #737

plan.title: feat(scripts,tasks,skills): pre-PR closing-keyword negation-context lint to prevent Layer 0 false-positive auto-closes

narratives.Description: feat(scripts,tasks,skills): pre-PR closing-keyword negation-context lint to prevent Layer 0 false-positive auto-closes

items.title: New scripts/pr_check_closing_keywords.py scanning PR body + commit messages for negation/quotation/example/code-block contexts

narrative.Action: Create `scripts/pr_check_closing_keywords.py` that reads PR body (`gh pr view <N> --json body`) AND every commit message in the PR (`gh pr view <N> --json commits --jq '.commits[].messageBody'`); scans for closing-keyword tokens (`close|closes|closed|fix|fixes|fixed|resolve|resolves|resolved`) followed by `#\d+`, case-insensitive; for each hit, examines a +/-20 char window for negation markers (`not\s+`, `n't\s+`, `never\s+`, `intentionally\s+(not\s+)?`, `does\s+not`, `do\s+not`, `won't\s+`, `cannot\s+`, `WITHOUT\s+`, `EXCEPT\s+`), quotation context (backticks, ASCII/curly quotes), example markers (`e.g.`, `i.e.`, `for example`, `like`, `such as`, `> ` blockquote prefix), and code-block context (triple-backtick fences). Three-state exit: 0 clean / 1 negation-context hits found / 2 config error. Supports `--pr <N>`, `--body-file <path>`, `--commits-file <path>`, `--allow-known-false-positives <issue-numbers>`.
narrative.Acceptance: Script implemented with three-state exit. Pure stdlib + `gh` CLI. Documented usage. Covered by `tests/cli/test_pr_check_closing_keywords.py` (>= 10 tests covering each detection variant, the escape hatch, and exit codes).

items.title: Add task pr:check-closing-keywords entry to tasks/pr.yml (no sources/generates, per task-caching convention)

narrative.Action:
Add new task entry under `tasks/pr.yml`:
```yaml
  check-closing-keywords:
    desc: "Scan PR body + commit messages for closing-keyword substrings in negation/quotation/example contexts that would trigger Layer 0 false-positive auto-closes (#737)"
    cmds:
      - uv run python "{{.DEFT_ROOT}}/scripts/pr_check_closing_keywords.py" {{.CLI_ARGS}}
```
Per `conventions/task-caching.md`: NO `sources:` / `generates:` because override flags MUST NOT be silently swallowed by go-task's incremental-build cache.
narrative.Acceptance: Task entry exists, callable end-to-end (e.g. `task pr:check-closing-keywords -- --pr 735` reports the seeded false-positive on the #735 incident body). No incremental-cache `sources`/`generates` declaration.

items.title: Update skills/deft-directive-pre-pr/SKILL.md Phase 4 (Diff) with `!` rule + `⊗` anti-pattern; cross-reference in skills/deft-directive-swarm/SKILL.md Phase 6 Step 1

narrative.Action: Add to `skills/deft-directive-pre-pr/SKILL.md` Phase 4 (Diff) a `!` MUST rule: `Run task pr:check-closing-keywords -- --pr <N> (or pass --body-file / --commits-file for offline checking) before opening the PR; refuse to push if findings`. Add corresponding `⊗` MUST NOT anti-pattern citing the recurrence record (#697, #401/#700, #735). Add a short cross-reference in `skills/deft-directive-swarm/SKILL.md` Phase 6 Step 1 pointing to the new gate alongside the existing `pr:check-protected-issues` rule, noting Layer 0 (prevention) vs Layer 3 (recovery).
narrative.Acceptance: Both skills updated. Sibling content test guard (`tests/content/test_pre_pr_skill_closing_keyword_rule.py`) asserts the rule + anti-pattern + cross-reference are present per existing `tests/content/test_skills.py` patterns.

items.title: Append #735 to existing meta/lessons.md `## GitHub Closing-Keyword False-Positive in Negation Context (2026-04)` entry

narrative.Action: Add a third recurrence-record bullet to the existing `## GitHub Closing-Keyword False-Positive in Negation Context (2026-04)` entry in `meta/lessons.md` citing the #735 incident (PR squash body contained 'DOES NOT CLOSE #734'; auto-closed #734; manually reopened) and noting this issue's structural lint as the gap-closer.
narrative.Acceptance: lessons.md entry updated. The existing #703-pattern self-test (or a new sibling) asserts presence of the third recurrence bullet.

narrative.Action: Net-new test files. CLI tests cover: negation-context detection ('DOES NOT CLOSE #N'), negation variants ('intentionally not Closes', 'never Fixes', 'WITHOUT closing'), quotation context (backticked closing keywords), example context ('e.g. Closes #N'), code-block context (triple-backtick-fenced), true-positive control (real 'Closes #N' NOT flagged), --pr <N> end-to-end with stubbed gh, --body-file / --commits-file offline mode, --allow-known-false-positives escape hatch, three-state exit codes. Content guard test asserts pre-pr skill prose + swarm skill cross-reference present.
narrative.Acceptance: >= 10 CLI tests + 1 content guard. All green under `task check`. CHANGELOG `[Unreleased] / ### Added` entry.

references.title: Issue #737: feat(scripts,tasks,skills): pre-PR closing-keyword negation-context lint to prevent Layer 0 false-positive auto-closes
